description_long: This is a compact, modern shotgun with a tactical design, featuring a short, boxy frame and a prominent rail system running along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The body is primarily matte black with metallic gray accents, and it has a perforated receiver for weight reduction and heat dissipation. The grip is angled and textured for ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is large and squared, allowing for gloved use. The shotgun has a dual-barrel configuration, with both barrels aligned horizontally, and the muzzle is recessed within a robust front housing. There is no traditional stock, but a pistol grip is present, making the weapon highly maneuverable in close-quarters urban environments. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a dual-barrel design, top rail, and pistol grip, finished in matte black and gray. Its robust, modern build is optimized for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual barrels recessed within a thick, rectangular muzzle housing and the top rail extending backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the perforated receiver, pistol grip, large squared trigger guard, and the full length of the top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alignment of the barrels, the rail system, and the back of the grip and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with additional details of the receiver and grip contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length and recessed within a rectangular muzzle housing
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, squared trigger guard with a flat bottom and ample space for gloved fingers
